0.text: Pleural effusion measuring 30 mm in depth in the right pleural space

1.text: Subpleural and intraparenchymal multiple metastatic nodules in the right lung

2.text: Nodular thickening in the right pleura

3.text: Areas of increased density consistent with consolidation in the right lung middle lobe, lower lobe superior, lower lobe mediobasal, and posterobasal segments
